for Construction

Construction Finance

The most complete lender & draw platform in Canada

Everything from invoice upload to credit committee report — built specifically for Canadian construction finance workflows.

AI Invoice Extraction

Gemini reads vendor, date, GST/HST/PST, subtotal, and total from any PDF or photo in seconds. Flags duplicates and overbilling automatically.

Draw & Lender Management

Package invoices into draw submissions. Track lender-approved vs submitted amounts, margins, holdback, and funding conditions with a dedicated lender portal.

WIP Schedule & CFO Reports

GAAP WIP Schedule (Excel export), backlog report, margin fade tracker, retainage aging, AP aging, committed vs buyout — the full CFO dashboard your accountant needs.

Interest Reserve & Covenants

LTC/LTV monitoring, interest reserve burn tracking, covenant breach detection (DSCR, LTV, equity-in-first), credit committee report auto-generation.

Sources & Uses

Track equity, senior debt, mezz, vendor take-back, and grants against all project uses. CMHC MLI Select equity-in-first verification built in.

Loan Syndication & Mezz

Multi-lender participation splits, mezz/second-mortgage tranche tracking with draw triggers and waterfall priority. CMHC take-out conversion tracker.

Stress Testing

Model interest reserve burn under +100/+200bps rate scenarios and 3–6 month schedule slippage. Red/amber/green RAG dashboard for portfolio-wide exposure.

QS / Inspector Portal

Structured QS report submissions with trade-level % complete. Upload any Altus, Pelican, or MNP PDF — Gemini extracts trades, deficiencies, and recommendation automatically.

AI Intelligence

Gemini AI runs through every module

Not a chatbot bolted on — AI woven into the workflow where it saves the most time.

AI Accountant

Flags duplicate invoices, stale draws, overbilling, and 8-dimension project distress score. Portfolio risk dashboard shows which projects need attention now.

AI Spec Review

Upload a 500-page spec book — Gemini finds conflicts, gaps, and compliance issues. Spec Q&A answers questions with Canadian code references. AI RFI and submittal log generator.

AI Document Q&A

"When was the curtain wall delivery promised?" — AI searches all RFIs, submittals, meeting minutes, daily logs, and change orders to answer with source citations.

AI CO Narrative

Describe a delay event — AI drafts a CCDC-clause-cited formal change order justification letter suitable for owner and lender submission. Cites GC 6.1, 6.2, 8.1 automatically.

AI Weekly Client Update

Gemini reads 7 days of daily logs, milestones, RFIs, and change orders, then drafts a professional client email in your chosen tone — ready to send in seconds.

AI Bank Reconciliation

Connect your bank via Flinks or upload CSV — AI matches transactions to unpaid invoices by amount + vendor name, suggests cost categories, and marks invoices paid in one click.

Canadian Compliance

The only platform built for Canadian construction law

US tools don't understand CCDC, holdback rules, prompt payment adjudication, or CMHC. We do — across all 13 provinces and territories.

CCDC Contract Library
CCDC 2, 4, 5A/5B, 14, 17, 30 + statutory declarations 9A/9B
Prompt Payment & Adjudication
Proper invoice validation, NNP workflow, adjudication case tracker with auto-computed deadlines — all 13 provinces
Holdback by Province
ON/BC/AB/QC/MB/SK/NS/NB/NL/PEI/YT/NT/NU holdback rules and lien windows built in
CMHC & GST/HST Rebates
CMHC MLI Select financing checklist, Purpose-Built Rental 100% rebate calculator, GST190/GST524/GST531 application tracker
T5018, WSIB/WCB, Bonds
T5018 CSV export, WSIB/WCB clearance tracking, bid bond / performance bond / L&M bond registry
TARION / Provincial Warranty
30-day, year-end, 2-year, and 7-year Tarion warranty tracking. BC/AB/QC/SK/MB residential warranty programs supported
13
Provinces & Territories
Holdback rules, prompt payment deadlines, lien periods
7
CCDC Contract Forms
CCDC 2, 4, 5A/5B, 14, 17, 30 + 9A/9B declarations
8
Proper Invoice Fields
Ontario Construction Act validator built in
100%
GST/HST Rebate
Purpose-Built Rental Housing (2024+)
No US tool comes close.
Procore, Autodesk, Rabbet, Buildertrend — none of them know what holdback is, what a CCDC 9A statutory declaration means, or how Ontario prompt payment adjudication works. Finel AI Projects was built from day one for the Canadian market.
Project Management & Field

Finance and field — unified

Your PM team and finance team in the same platform. No more data moving between Procore and QuickBooks.

Acumatica Connector
Platform

Built for the office and the job site

PWA installable on any device today. Native iOS and Android builds ready — submit to App Store and Play Store when you're ready.

Offline Mode
Service Worker v3 + IndexedDB queues mutations offline, replays via Background Sync API on reconnect. Field-tested in dead-zone job sites.
GPS on Mobile
One-tap GPS capture on timecards and daily logs. Bottom navigation bar designed for one-thumb field use.
Native App Ready (Capacitor)
Capacitor wrapper pre-configured. Run npm install && npx cap add ios android and open in Xcode/Android Studio. App Store ready.
Multi-Tenant Security
11 roles (owner, finance_admin, pm_admin, vendor_finance, vendor_pm, etc.), field-level data isolation, full audit log, PIPEDA-compliant data residency.

What you get

75+ modules. One platform.

Live sample data · No account needed

Explore a live project

Click below to open a pre-loaded demo with 20 real-world construction invoices, 3 draws, provincial & federal claims, and a full cost breakdown — so you can see exactly what the dashboard looks like before getting access.

20 invoices · $762k in costs · 3 draws (approved + submitted) · Provincial & federal claims · Sample data — read & explore freely

Frequently Asked Questions

Everything you need to know before getting started.

Finel AI Projects is the complete operating system for Canadian construction — 75+ integrated modules covering construction finance (draws, lender portals, WIP reports, covenants, interest reserve, stress testing), project management (tasks, RFIs, safety, labour, permits), Canadian compliance (CCDC contracts, prompt payment, adjudication, CMHC), AI intelligence (invoice extraction, AI accountant, spec review, CO narrative, bank reconciliation), field operations, and integrations with QuickBooks, Sage, Foundation, Jonas, and bank feeds — all in one platform built exclusively for Canadian GCs, developers, and construction lenders.
Upload any PDF or image invoice. Gemini AI reads the document and extracts every field — vendor name, invoice number, date, line items, subtotal, HST/GST/PST, and total — in seconds. You can review and correct any field before saving.
Yes. Click Try Demo to explore a pre-loaded project with 20 real-world construction invoices, 3 draws, and a full cost breakdown — no account or sign-up required. Demo data is read-only and resets on exit.
PDF, JPG, PNG, and WEBP files are all supported. You can upload multiple invoices at once and the AI processes them in parallel.
Accounts are set up by your organization administrator. If your company uses Finel AI Projects, ask your admin to create your credentials. New organizations can contact us to get onboarded.
Yes. Your data is fully isolated per organization — no other organization can access your projects or invoices. All data is stored on Canadian servers and never used to train AI models.

The complete platform for Canadian construction

75+ modules. One login. Built exclusively for Canadian GCs, developers, and lenders. Sign in or contact us to get set up.

Manage Columns

Control which fields Gemini extracts, which appear in the table, and which are included in exports

# Key Label Type Description Active View Export Sys

Active = extracted by Gemini. View = shown in dashboard table. Export = included in Excel / JSON downloads. All three are independent.

Line Item Columns

Controls line item extraction, view, and export
Field Label Active View Export

Categories

View your cost structure, manage categories, and map vendors to categories for automatic classification.

Current Cost Structure

Your project categories and sub-categories. Manage these in Project Finance → Cost Categories.

No cost categories configured. Go to Project Finance to set up.
How it works: Add your Categories first (e.g. Materials, Labour). Then click a category to add Sub-Categories under it (e.g. Electrical, Mechanical). For construction invoices, click a sub-category to add Sub-Divisions (e.g. Rough Framing, Concrete). Gemini will pick the correct values automatically when processing invoices.
Categories
Sub-Categories of
Sub-Divisions of

Vendor → Category Mapping

Assign a category and sub-category to each vendor. Click "Re-classify All" to apply to all existing invoices.

Updated invoices, unchanged.

Budget vs Actual

Lender view — shows lender-approved budgets vs actual invoiced amounts. Lender budget per category can be set in the category edit. (No separate lender budgets set — showing internal budgets.)

Holdback / Retainage

Jonas Construction

Excel (All Invoices)

Full invoice data in Excel format for any ERP manual import

QB Desktop IIF

QuickBooks Desktop IIF format — import via QB Desktop → File → Utilities → Import → IIF Files

Sage 50 Canada

Sage 50 CA (Simply Accounting) purchase journal import CSV — compatible with Sage 50 Canadian Edition 2020+

All exports include invoices from your current organization. Use the project filter in the URL to scope to a single project. For Sage Intacct, CMiC, or Acumatica — contact support for custom mapping.

Transactions

      

        
        
      

    

    

      AI matched  of  transactions. 
    

    

      
      
No transactions in this filter. Click "Sync" to pull transactions from your bank, or switch filter.

    

  







  

    
Connect Bank Account

    
    

      
Flinks Open Banking (Canada)

      
Flinks connects to RBC, TD, Scotiabank, BMO, CIBC, National Bank, and 200+ Canadian financial institutions via secure OAuth. Your credentials never pass through Finel servers.

      
Flinks API key required. Get your Flinks account → add FLINKS_API_KEY to your environment → live bank connections activate automatically.

      

        

      

    

    
    
Or add manually

       auto-matched /  total
